title: Another judge falls prey to online fraud, loses ₹93,000
description: A judge of the Small Causes Court in Mumbai has lodged a police complaint after being duped of ₹93,000 in an online fraud by a caller posing as a Samsung customer care executive.According to a first information report (FIR) lodged on March 30, the incident occurred when the judge's Samsung S22 phone developed a pink line on its display while at work. The judge searched for Samsung’s official helpline on Google and dialed a number found online.A man calling himself a Samsung representative later
